div.head:
No. 647
Editorial Note
div.p:
Secretary Dulles and his advisers traveled to Paris for a series of meetings with the French and British July 13–14. For documentation concerning these conversations, which were largely devoted to Indochina, see volume XIII, Part 2, pages 1819 ff. For a record of the meeting between Dulles, MacArthur, and Prime Minister Mendès-France on July 13, which dealt with matters relating to
the EDC, see the memorandum of conversation by MacArthur, Infra.
